_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Knowledge of uncertainty measurement principles and practices
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of data quality dimensions (accuracy, completeness, consistency, timeliness, uniqueness, validity, integrity) and the measurement approaches applicable to each dimension.
comments: NICE knowledge intersects with WIDAI DQ domain. Knowledge DQ-K-004 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: RM-K-001 (RM, cosine: 0.482), AB-T-009 (AB, cosine: 0.457).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark. Both texts processed jointly through transformer; outputs calibrated 0-1 similarity score.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.3/10 (raw 0.530). Shared vocabulary: [knowledge, measurement]. NICE-only terms [practices, principles, uncertainty] vs WIDAI-only terms [accuracy, applicable, approaches, completeness, consistency, data] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.description: Token-level contextual embedding matching. Precision = FDE coverage of KSA tokens. Recall = KSA coverage by FDE tokens. F1 = harmonic mean.
bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.868 (P=0.909, R=0.830). P exceeds R by 0.079 — the NICE element's 7 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 20 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the NICE element.

nli_cross_encoder.description: Natural Language Inference. Classifies text pair as entailment, neutral, or contradiction. Indicates directional implication strength.
nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (98.7%). "Knowledge of uncertainty measurement principles and practices" and "Knowledge of data quality dimensions (accuracy, completeness, consistency, timel" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity. Each text encoded independently; measures vector-space proximity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.516 ≈ STS 0.530 (gap 0.015). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [knowledge, measurement] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens). Purely lexical baseline, hand-traceable.
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 17.4%. Shared tokens: [knowledge, measurement]. NICE-only: [practices, principles, uncertainty]. WIDAI-only: [accuracy, applicable, approaches, completeness, consistency, data].
